title: QQQ 표준화 이익 서프라이즈 신호 검증
hypothesis: 과거 시점의 QQQ 구성 종목에서 최근 분기 EPS의 전년 동기 대비 변화가 과거 변동성보다 큰 종목일수록 이후 3·6·12개월 수익률이 더 높다.

noveltyContract.novelDimension: 최근 발표 실적이 컨센서스보다 낮은 종목을 단순 제외한 이전 실험과 달리, 당시 공개된 분기 Basic EPS 12개로 SUE를 계산하고 전체 QQQ 구성 종목을 5분위로 나눠 신호의 순서성과 향후 수익을 먼저 검증한다.

dataContract.source: QuantConnect point-in-time QQQ ETF constituents, adjusted US Equity prices, and Morningstar US Fundamentals
dataContract.universe: Point-in-time QQQ constituents with a five-trading-day membership lag
dataContract.fundamentalCapture: Daily point-in-time Morningstar observations for the top 1500 US equities by dollar volume plus current QQQ members; duplicate fill-forward rows are collapsed by fiscal period end and the first publicly observed value is retained

capitalContract.fxSource: not applicable to signal monotonicity study

executionContract.quintileRule: Sort every valid SUE value ascending with Symbol ID tie-breaks and split into five near-equal groups; Q1 is lowest and Q5 highest
executionContract.returnRule: Equal-weight adjusted total return from next open to the horizon close; compare every cohort with QQQ over identical dates
executionContract.delistingRule: Use the QuantConnect delisting warning price, otherwise the last available adjusted close, and keep proceeds at zero return through the cohort horizon
executionContract.incompleteCohortRule: Do not use a cohort whose horizon extends beyond 2024-12-31
